the_thoughts_feel_unbearable_b: "The thoughts feel unbearable. But having them does not make you a bad person — not even close."
pure_o_ocd_is_a_form_of_ocd_wh: Pure O OCD is a form of OCD where the obsessions happen entirely in the mind. Unlike other types of OCD, there are no visible rituals — no washing, no checking, no arranging. Instead the compulsions are mental — replaying thoughts, seeking reassurance, mentally reviewing past events, or trying to neutralise a thought by replacing it with a 'good' one. It is exhausting in a way that is very hard to explain to others.
what_kind_of_thoughts_does_pur: What kind of thoughts does Pure O bring?
pure_o_ocd_is_one_of_the_most_: Pure O OCD is one of the most misunderstood and underdiagnosed forms of OCD. Many people suffer in silence for years, convinced that their thoughts mean something terrible about them. They don't. What makes Pure O OCD so cruel is that it targets the things you care about most — your relationships, your values, your sense of self. That is the nature of OCD, not the nature of you.
your_mind_is_not_your_enemy_it: "Your mind is not your enemy — it's just stuck in a loop. With the right support and tools, you can learn to let these thoughts pass without giving them power. You are so much more than the thoughts your brain throws at you. 💙"
